---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---
# Libraries
```{r, warning=FALSE}
library(targets)
```


# Check pipeline status
```{r}
tar_glimpse()
```


```{r}
tar_visnetwork()
```

# Construct pipeline
```{r}
# targets::tar_make(callr_function = NULL)
targets::tar_make()
```

# Destroy pipeline (off by default)
```{r, warning=FALSE, eval = FALSE }
tar_destroy()
# targets::tar_destroy(ask = FALSE)

```
